title: Midnighttigger's Better Grass
body:
Midnighttigger's Better Grass

    The Goal of this Resourcepack is to enable Better Grass inspired by the LambaBetterGrass has onto Fusion.
    With this & Fusion you can run Better Grass textures on forge/neo too

Features?

  • Grass
  • Snowy Grass
  • Path
  • Podzol
  • Mycelium
  • Farmland
  • Crimson Nylium
  • Warped Nylium

FAQ

  • No connected textures? -> look at the top of the modpage!
  • "made for an older version of Minecraft" -> just load the pack as normal and it should run fine unless mojang has made significant changes to their resourcepack format
  • Make sure you have the correct version for your version and correct version of Fusion
  • Addons? -> No official Page exists
  • Breaks with sodium pre 0.6.0 without indium, this is mostly because sodium (not embeddium) changes the fabric rendering system so indium fixes that

Legal Info

    All Rights Reserved Unless otherwise stated, Modpack and use in videos such as youtube is fine

Possible Features in the Future?

  • Better Snow could be done in the future
